title: Stavanger Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stavanger, with a Z-Score of -3.20. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stavanger are exceptionally cold, with a high demand for heating. 
 The HDD value of 12.2 GG is significantly higher than average, while CDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 61%, and the wind speed is 20.5 km/h, exacerbating the cold temperatures.
conclusion: Implement emergency cold snap protocols immediately.
